Running command: # repair_design running for 14+ min on 14100 violations. Normal for 90K cell design.
# Set extremely long monitoring with 1-hour polls.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

echo "Long-running PnR monitoring. 1-hour checks. Start: $(date)"
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  sleep 3600  # 1 hour

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_MTIME=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) mtime=$LOG_MTIME"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  tail -3 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    echo ""
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    echo ""
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

message:
Running command: # 52 min elapsed, log still frozen since 11:45 (15 min). repair_design computing hard.
# PnR will take several more hours. Set up robust background monitoring and check periodically.

# Background monitor (every 10 min, writes to file)
cat > /tmp/lr_bg_monitor.sh << 'BGEOF'
#!/bin/bash
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476
OUT="/tmp/lr_bg_status.log"
echo "$(date): BG monitor started" > "$OUT"
while kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; do
  sleep 600
  T=$(date '+%H:%M:%S')
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  EL=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  OR_MEM=$(ps aux | grep "openroad\b" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $4}' | head -1)
  LOG_MT=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  LOG_SZ=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  FGDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FLEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$T] alive($EL) step=$STEP OR_mem=${OR_MEM}% log=${LOG_SZ}B mtime=$LOG_MT" >> "$OUT"
  [ -n "$FGDS" ] && echo "[$T] GDS=$FGDS" >> "$OUT"
  [ -n "$FLEF" ] && echo "[$T] LEF=$FLEF" >> "$OUT"
done
echo "$(date): LR DONE" >> "$OUT"
tail -50 "$LOG" >> "$OUT"
BGEOF
chmod +x /tmp/lr_bg_monitor.sh
pkill -f "lr_bg_monitor.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
nohup /tmp/lr_bg_monitor.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "BG monitor PID=$!, log=/tmp/lr_bg_status.log"

# Now just wait in long loops
for i in $(seq 1 48); do
  sleep 1800
  echo "=== $(date) ==="
  tail -3 /tmp/lr_bg_status.log 2>/dev/null
  FGDS=$(ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/final/gds/*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  [ -n "$FGDS" ] && echo "*** FINAL GDS: $FGDS ***" && break
